room.caption: [CWFH] You could be sneaky, or not.

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="It seems the Seeker Bots lock this door up there when they go in alert mode. We've noticed that you can't cheat it by coming from the left.# -Management" signSize=3
moveType=0 moveSpd=2 initDir=0 turnDelay=64 turnDegree=180 sightX=1 sightY=1
